name: Junkrat
description: A mobile Assassin that bombards the enemy from afar, and sows chaos with traps and mines.
title: Junker Demolitionist
info: The destruction of the Australian omnium left the area an irradiated waste and survivors like Jamison Fawkes were greatly affected by radiation. Now as the explosive-obsessed criminal Junkrat, he is renowned for leaving havoc and bedlam in his wake.

Junkrat.name: Frag Launcher
Junkrat.description: Launch a grenade that explodes at the end of its path or upon hitting an enemy, dealing 124 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Grenades can ricochet off of terrain. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Stores up to 4 charges. Frag Launcher's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.

Junkrat.name: Concussion Mine
Junkrat.description: Place a mine on the ground. Junkrat's Trait can be activated to detonate the mine, dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.  Limit 1 active mine.

Junkrat.name: Steel Trap
Junkrat.description: Place a trap on the ground that arms after 2 seconds. Deals 130 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy that walks over it and Roots them for 2 seconds.  Limit 1 active trap.

Junkrat.name: RIP-Tire
Junkrat.description: Create a motorized bomb with 530 (+4% per level) Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 (+4% per level) damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 (+4% per level) to enemies on the edge.

Junkrat.name: Rocket Ride
Junkrat.description: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.

Junkrat.name: Total Mayhem
Junkrat.description: Upon dying, drop 5 grenades that explode after 0.75 seconds, each dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals 75% less damage to Structures.  Detonate Mine  Detonate an active Concussion Mine.

1.name: Tricky Shuffles
1.description: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.

1.name: Extra-Wound Timers
1.description: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals 100% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.

1.name: Blow 'Em Up!
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.

4.name: Taste For Explosions
4.description: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.

4.name: BOOM POW
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.

4.name: Chattering Teeth
4.description: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.

7.name: Bogged Down
7.description: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.

7.name: Sticky Wicket
7.description: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.

7.name: Dirty Trickster
7.description: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.  This effect has a 20 second cooldown.

10.name: RIP-Tire
10.description: Create a motorized bomb with 530 (+4% per level) Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 (+4% per level) damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 (+4% per level) to enemies on the edge.

10.name: Rocket Ride
10.description: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.

13.name: Bombs Away
13.description: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1. Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.

13.name: Ripper Air
13.description: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.

13.name: Gotta Trap 'Em All!
13.description: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.

13.name: Big As
13.description: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.

16.name: Burst Fire
16.description: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.

16.name: Endless Nades
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

16.name: Spread Volley
16.description: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.

20.name: Extra Oomph
20.description: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 80%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.

20.name: Puckish Scamp
20.description: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.  Passive: Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.

20.name: Cannonball!
20.description: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.

20.name: I Hate Waiting!
20.description: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.JunkratBOOMPOWConcussionMineTalent: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,JunkratConcussionMineBOOMPOWHitEnemyCooldownRedution,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratBigAsSteelTrapTalent: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,JunkratSteelTrapBigAsArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratSteelTrapBigAsArmorDebuff,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JunkratSteelTrapDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratBlowEmUpConcussionMineTalent: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,JunkratConcussionMineDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BlowEmUp].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratConcussionMineBlowEmUpBonusDamageBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratBoggedDownConcussionMineTalent: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratConcussionMineBoggedDownSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratConcussionMineBoggedDownSlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds upon landing.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratBombsAwayFragLauncherTalent: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,JunkratFragLauncherBombsAwayTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c>. Frag Launcher grenades fired within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratFragLauncherBombsAwayBonusDamageBehavior,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds of using a Basic Attack deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,JunkratFragLauncherExplosionDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BombsAwayBonusDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratBurstFireFragLauncherTalent: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,JunkratFragLauncherBurstFire,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds, but it loses <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> maximum charge.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratCannonballFragLauncherTalent: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,JunkratFragLauncherCannonball,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value-1*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratChatteringTeethSteelTrapTalent: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.

Junkrat's Trait can be activated to detonate the mine, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JunkratConcussionMineDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.<n/><n/>Limit <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> active mine.

When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JunkratTotalMayhemCreateUnitPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> grenades at his feet that explode. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,JunkratTotalMayhemDirtyTrickster,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> second cooldown.

Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,JunkratTotalMayhemDamage,AttributeFactor[Structure]"Precision="2"/>%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/><s val="StandardTooltipHeader">Detonate Mine</s><n/><n/>Detonate an active Concussion Mine.
tooltipMarkup.JunkratTrickyShufflesFragLauncherTalent: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JunkratFragLauncherTrickyShufflesMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,JunkratHeroWeaponRangedExplosionDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[TrickyShuffles].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage.
